all.name: Danish Intelligence
all.longDescription:
Danish Intelligence Core is a unified service that handles everything Danish for your media stack in one place. It replaces three separate containers (dksubs-proxy, ob-proxy, and danskarr) with a single, high-performance engine.

One-click setup: The service can auto-discover Prowlarr, Radarr, and Sonarr API keys from mounted Cosmos config folders, rewires legacy dksubs-proxy URLs, paints Custom Formats and Quality Profiles, and exposes /status for post-install checks. OldBoys credentials are optional.

all.name: Prowlarr (Danish Prerequisite)
all.description: Prowlarr preconfigured for the Danish media-stack network
all.longDescription:
Prowlarr prerequisite for Danish Media Stack

Install this first on clean servers, then configure your indexers in Prowlarr before installing the full Danish Media Stack. This manifest joins the shared media-stack Docker network and provides the lowercase prowlarr DNS alias required by Danish Intelligence.

all.name: AltMount (Danish Edition)
all.description: Patched streaming engine for Danish content
all.longDescription:
AltMount (Danish Edition) is a custom-patched streaming engine optimized for the Danish media stack. It includes fixes for compressed 'rar2.9' rejections and usenet deadlocks.

Requirements: Requires /dev/fuse access and SYS_ADMIN privileges to perform the virtual mount.

all.name: Danish Media Stack (Plex Edition)
all.description: The 1-click Danish Media Stack with Plex
all.longDescription:
The Total Automation Blueprint - Plex Edition

This installs everything in one click: Plex, Seerr, Radarr, Sonarr, AltMount, and Danish Intelligence.

Clean-server prerequisite: install Prowlarr (Danish Prerequisite) from this same market source first, then configure your indexers.

Once installed, the Intelligence core will automatically discover your pre-configured Prowlarr and the new Arrs. It will build the clean Plex-ready folder structure, set up the AltMount download clients, paint all Danish Custom Formats and Quality Profiles, create Seerr request targets, and create Plex libraries using the local Plex admin token when available. Optional Plex claim/access-token fields are available for claimed Plex setups. No private Seerr, Plex, Radarr, or Sonarr API keys are stored in this market manifest.

all.name: Danish Media Stack (Jellyfin Edition)
all.description: The 1-click Danish Media Stack with Jellyfin
all.longDescription:
The Total Automation Blueprint - Jellyfin Edition

This installs everything in one click: Jellyfin, Seerr, Radarr, Sonarr, AltMount, and Danish Intelligence.

Clean-server prerequisite: install Prowlarr (Danish Prerequisite) from this same market source first, then configure your indexers.

Once installed, the Intelligence core will automatically discover your pre-configured Prowlarr and the new Arrs. It will build the clean Jellyfin-ready folder structure, set up the AltMount download clients, paint all Danish Custom Formats and Quality Profiles, create Seerr request targets, and create/reuse a private Jellyfin API key for Seerr and library automation. No private Seerr, Jellyfin, Radarr, or Sonarr API keys are stored in this market manifest.
